description_long: This is a classic, vintage-style scooter with a deep red body and black trim, featuring a rounded front shield and a single, wide seat. The scooter is equipped with two large, circular rearview mirrors mounted on chrome handlebars, and a prominent headlight centered on the front shield. The rear section includes a luggage rack and a side compartment, both integrated into the streamlined bodywork. The wheels are thick and robust, with visible treads suitable for urban roads. The seat is contoured for comfort, and the footrest area is spacious and flat, designed for easy mounting and dismounting. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic Italian scooters, blending retro aesthetics with practical urban mobility.
description: A vintage-style red scooter with chrome handlebars, round mirrors, a single seat, and a rear luggage rack. It features a prominent front shield and classic, streamlined bodywork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded shield, central headlight, and two large circular mirrors on chrome handlebars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contoured seat, rear luggage rack, and the side compartment integrated into the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the luggage rack, seat shape, and the back of the front shield with both mirrors visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, rear rack, and the scooter's streamlined profile.
attribute_deck_design: wide, flat, and smooth with a slightly textured footrest area
